name: v2 RC webhook: is_family_share guard absent from all handlers
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L11-01] v2 RC handlers (initial/renewal/product-change/non-renewing/uncancellation) skip escalateAndSkipFamilyShare; a family-share event under the v2 flag grants paid entitlement N times with no Sentry escalation. Behind IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED (off in prod). Fix: port the guard into each v2 handler before grant.
acceptanceCriteria:
Root cause (at time of capture): v2 RevenueCat handlers (handleInitialPurchaseV2, handleRenewalV2, handleProductChangeV2, handleNonRenewingPurchaseV2) in apps/api/src/services/billing/billing-v2/revenuecat-webhook-handler-v2.ts lacked the isFamilyShareBlocked guard present in their v1 counterparts, allowing family-share events to grant paid entitlement with no Sentry escalation under IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED.

Current state: FIX ALREADY SHIPPED in PR #1335 (commit decaa9d17). isFamilyShareBlocked is defined at revenuecat-webhook-handler-v2.ts:92-110 and called at the top of all four v2 handlers before any DB access (lines 147, 200, 560, 607). Unit tests covering all four v2 handlers exist in apps/api/src/services/billing/billing-v2/revenuecat-webhook-handler-v2.test.ts (Issue 836 suite, lines 74-178) using a throwingDb Proxy to assert no DB access occurs on family-share events.

Variants covered: (a) initial purchase with is_family_share=true; (b) renewal with is_family_share=true; (c) product change with is_family_share=true; (d) non-renewing purchase with is_family_share=true. All four blocked + escalated in v2; uncancellation is not an entitlement-granting path and does not require the guard.

Executor verification task: run the Issue 836 suite (pnpm exec nx run api:test --testPathPattern=revenuecat-webhook-handler-v2) and confirm all four family-share guard tests pass. Mark the WI closed if they do.
riskImpact: Without the guard, a family-share RC event under IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED would grant paid entitlement to a family-plan sub-member N times with no Sentry signal. Fix is confirmed shipped (PR #1335). IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED is off in prod, limiting blast radius.
